category_sources: Official GitHub repository at https://github.com/rshelekhov/lazymake describes interactive target selection, dependency visualization, and command safety analysis for Makefiles.
source_facts.description says it is a modern TUI for Makefiles.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Lazymake - A Beautiful TUI for Your Makefiles.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is an official documentation fallback.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site and best dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/rshelekhov/lazymake, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository description mentions dependency visualization and command safety analysis.
